title: RGIPT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for GeM/ CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive Posts
organization: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT)
short_info: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT) GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive Notification 2026 has been released on the official website rgipt.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RGIPT GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's/Master's degree in Commerce, Management, Engineering, or related field
qualification.details: Bachelor's/Master's degree in Commerce, Management, Engineering, or related field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RGIPT GeM/CPP Purchasing & Procurement Executive Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
